name: list_components
description:
List all available components — both `@heroui-pro/react` (Pro) and `@heroui/react` (OSS).
Returns Pro components organized by category, followed by the full OSS component list.
This is a unified MCP — you do NOT need a separate OSS MCP installed.
Always call this first to discover what components are available before implementing.
Workflow: list_components → get_component_docs → get_css → implement.
